title: abutilon cuspidatum
intro: Abutilon cuspidatum, also known as Indian mallow or Chinese mallow, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. The roots and leaves of Abutilon cuspidatum have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting the immune system. Abutilon cuspidatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
